name: Lewinsky-Ofer Ltd.
summary: Lewinsky-Ofer Ltd. operates as a public construction and entrepreneurship company in Israel. It constructs residential properties; office and industry buildings; educational institutions; and residential neighborhoods. The company was formerly known as Paz Hen Ltd. and changed its name to Lewinsky-Ofer Ltd. in 2013. Lewinsky-Ofer Ltd. was incorporated in 1977 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
